title: Amazon's Adaptive Display for Fire TVs is officially rolling out today - Engadget
summary: Adaptive Display is rolling out to the Fire TV Stick HD today. Adaptive Display seemed like one of the more notable improvements for this latest Fire TV model, which also boasts a more streamlined form factor and some additional Alexa+ integrations.
